title: Image Generation Flow
interaction_flow_generate: AiManager → AiManager: imagesAreFaked()? clone provider + useImageGateway(fakeGateway) : real provider
PendingImageGeneration → provider: defaultImageModel() [if model is null]
PendingImageGeneration → ImageProvider: image(prompt, attachments, size, quality, model, timeout): ImageResponse
ImageProvider → PendingImageGeneration: return ImageResponse(images, usage, meta)
NOTE: FailoverableException triggers event(ProviderFailedOver) and tries next provider in list
interaction_flow_queue: ALT real: PendingImageGeneration → GenerateImage::dispatch(this, provider, model): PendingDispatch
GenerateImage → PendingImageGeneration: generate(provider, model) [calls full generate flow above]
key_relationships: PendingImageGeneration depends_on Ai facade (for fakeableImageProvider, imagesAreFaked, recordImageGeneration)
AiManager implements fakeableImageProvider: wraps real Provider with FakeImageGateway when faked
GenerateImage (ShouldQueue job) holds PendingImageGeneration and calls generate() async
ImageResponse holds Collection<GeneratedImage>, Usage, Meta; implements Countable+Htmlable
QueuedImageResponse wraps PendingDispatch (or FakePendingDispatch when faked)

key_classes.Image: Static facade. of(prompt) → PendingImageGeneration. Also fake()/assert* helpers.
key_classes.PendingImageGeneration: Builder/fluent. Props: prompt, attachments[], size, quality, timeout. Methods: size(), quality(), portrait(), landscape(), square(), attachments(), timeout(), generate(), queue().
key_classes.AiManager: extends MultipleInstanceManager. imageProvider(name): validates ImageProvider. fakeableImageProvider(name): injects FakeImageGateway if faked.
key_classes.GenerateImage: ShouldQueue job. Holds PendingImageGeneration. handle() calls pendingImage->generate(provider,model).
key_classes.ImageResponse: Holds Collection<GeneratedImage>, Usage, Meta. store()/storeAs()/toHtml() helpers.

failover_logic: generate() iterates provider list; catches FailoverableException, fires ProviderFailedOver event, continues to next provider; throws last exception if all fail.
